Class CodiceFiscaleParser

Namespace
CodiceFiscale
Assembly
CodiceFiscale.dll

Provides methods to parse an Italian Codice Fiscale into its constituent data.

public class CodiceFiscaleParser

Constructors

CodiceFiscaleParser()

Provides methods to parse an Italian Codice Fiscale into its constituent data.

public CodiceFiscaleParser()

Methods

Parse(string)

Parses the specified Codice Fiscale and returns the decoded personal data.

public static CodiceFiscaleData Parse(string cf)

Parameters

cf string

The Codice Fiscale string to parse. Case-insensitive.

Returns

CodiceFiscaleData

A CodiceFiscaleData instance containing the gender, date of birth, and Belfiore code extracted from the Codice Fiscale.

Exceptions

InvalidCodiceFiscaleException

Thrown when cf is not a valid Codice Fiscale.
